title: Square Grass
description: Grass with the same model as wheat.
body:
This resource pack changes the model of grass to be the same as the model of wheat, which makes the grass look thicker and more lush. This resource pack aims to make the game feel more immersive.

![A comparison of the resource pack with vanilla Minecraft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa4d833c285cd704ebd11755f0eeff71e6c54eb9.png)
